root.description: The permission type of the workspace. If `SERVICE_MANAGED` is specified, the IAM roles and IAM policy attachments are generated automatically. If `CUSTOMER_MANAGED` is specified, the IAM roles and IAM policy attachments will not be created
root.name: permission_type

root.description: Name to use on workspace IAM role created
root.name: iam_role_name

root.description: Workspace IAM role path
root.name: iam_role_path

root.description: The authentication providers for the workspace. Valid values are `AWS_SSO`, `SAML`, or both
root.name: authentication_providers

root.description: Existing IAM role ARN for the workspace. Required if `create_iam_role` is set to `false`
root.name: iam_role_arn

root.description: Maximum session duration (in seconds) that you want to set for the IAM role
root.name: iam_role_max_session_duration

root.description: ARN of the policy that is used to set the permissions boundary for the IAM role
root.name: iam_role_permissions_boundary

root.description: Determines whether IAM permissions for alerting are enabled for the workspace IAM role
root.name: enable_alerts

root.description: Map of workspace service account definitions to create
root.name: workspace_service_accounts

root.description: Determines whether the SAML configuration will be created
root.name: create_saml_configuration

root.description: SAML authentication admin role values
root.name: saml_admin_role_values

root.description: SAML authentication editor role values
root.name: saml_editor_role_values

root.description: SAML authentication groups assertion
root.name: saml_groups_assertion

root.description: SAML authentication IDP Metadata URL. Note that either `saml_idp_metadata_url` or `saml_idp_metadata_xml`
root.name: saml_idp_metadata_url

root.description: SAML authentication role assertion
root.name: saml_role_assertion

root.description: Determines whether a license will be associated with the workspace
root.name: associate_license

root.description: A token from Grafana Labs that ties your AWS account with a Grafana Labs account
root.name: grafana_token

root.description: Determines if a security group is created
root.name: create_security_group

root.description: A map of additional tags to add to the security group created
root.name: security_group_tags

root.description: Determines whether the IAM role name (`wokspace_iam_role_name`) is used as a prefix
root.name: use_iam_role_name_prefix

root.description: SAML authentication email assertion
root.name: saml_login_assertion

root.description: SAML authentication login validity duration
root.name: saml_login_validity_duration

root.description: Name to use on security group created
root.name: security_group_name

root.description: Determines whether the security group name (`security_group_name`) is used as a prefix
root.name: security_group_use_name_prefix

root.description: The type of account access for the workspace. Valid values are `CURRENT_ACCOUNT` and `ORGANIZATION`
root.name: account_access_type

root.description: The description of the workspace IAM role
root.name: iam_role_description

root.description: Determines whether the workspace IAM role policies will be forced to detach
root.name: iam_role_force_detach_policies

root.description: Map of workspace API key definitions to create
root.name: workspace_api_keys

root.description: SAML authentication email assertion
root.name: saml_email_assertion

root.description: Description of the security group created
root.name: security_group_description

root.description: Security group rules to add to the security group created
root.name: security_group_rules

root.description: A map of tags to add to all resources
root.name: tags

root.description: The workspace description
root.name: description

root.description: SAML authentication allowed organizations
root.name: saml_allowed_organizations

root.description: SAML authentication IDP Metadata XML. Note that either `saml_idp_metadata_url` or `saml_idp_metadata_xml`
root.name: saml_idp_metadata_xml

root.description: Determines whether a resources will be created
root.name: create

root.description: The data sources for the workspace. Valid values are `AMAZON_OPENSEARCH_SERVICE`, `ATHENA`, `CLOUDWATCH`, `PROMETHEUS`, `REDSHIFT`, `SITEWISE`, `TIMESTREAM`, `XRAY`
root.name: data_sources

root.description: Specifies the version of Grafana to support in the new workspace. If not specified, the default version for the `aws_grafana_workspace` resource will be used. See `aws_grafana_workspace` documentation for available options.
root.name: grafana_version

root.description: Configuration for network access to your workspace
root.name: network_access_control

root.description: The Amazon Organizations organizational units that the workspace is authorized to use data sources from
root.name: organizational_units

root.description: The AWS CloudFormation stack set name that provisions IAM roles to be used by the workspace
root.name: stack_set_name

root.description: Determines whether a an IAM role is created or to use an existing IAM role
root.name: create_iam_role

root.description: SAML authentication name assertion
root.name: saml_name_assertion

root.description: The ID of an existing workspace to use when `create_workspace` is `false`
root.name: workspace_id

root.description: The role name that the workspace uses to access resources through Amazon Organizations
root.name: organization_role_name

root.description: The configuration settings for an Amazon VPC that contains data sources for your Grafana workspace to connect to
root.name: vpc_configuration

root.description: A map of additional tags to add to the IAM role created
root.name: iam_role_tags

root.description: Map of workspace service account tokens to create
root.name: workspace_service_account_tokens

root.description: SAML authentication org assertion
root.name: saml_org_assertion

root.description: The type of license for the workspace license association. Valid values are `ENTERPRISE` and `ENTERPRISE_FREE_TRIAL`
root.name: license_type

root.description: Map of maps to assocaite user/group IDs to a role. Map key can be used as the `role`
root.name: role_associations

root.description: List of ARNs of IAM policies to attach to the workspace IAM role
root.name: iam_role_policy_arns

root.description: Determines whether a workspace will be created or to use an existing workspace
root.name: create_workspace

root.description: The configuration string for the workspace
root.name: configuration

root.description: The Grafana workspace name
root.name: name

root.description: The notification destinations. If a data source is specified here, Amazon Managed Grafana will create IAM roles and permissions needed to use these destinations. Must be set to `SNS`
root.name: notification_destinations

root.description: IAM role name of the Grafana workspace
root.name: workspace_iam_role_name

root.description: Status of the SAML configuration
root.name: saml_configuration_status

root.description: If `license_type` is set to `ENTERPRISE_FREE_TRIAL`, this is the expiration date of the free trial
root.name: license_free_trial_expiration

root.description: Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the security group
root.name: security_group_arn

root.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Grafana workspace
root.name: workspace_arn

root.description: The ID of the Grafana workspace
root.name: workspace_id

root.description: The version of Grafana running on the workspace
root.name: workspace_grafana_version

root.description: The workspace service account tokens created including their attributes
root.name: workspace_service_account_tokens

root.description: IAM role ARN of the Grafana workspace
root.name: workspace_iam_role_arn

root.description: Stable and unique string identifying the IAM role
root.name: workspace_iam_role_unique_id

root.description: IAM Policy name of the Grafana workspace IAM role
root.name: workspace_iam_role_policy_name

root.description: If `license_type` is set to `ENTERPRISE`, this is the expiration date of the enterprise license
root.name: license_expiration

root.description: The workspace API keys created including their attributes
root.name: workspace_api_keys

root.description: Stable and unique string identifying the IAM Policy
root.name: workspace_iam_role_policy_id

root.description: ID of the security group
root.name: security_group_id

root.description: IAM Policy ARN of the Grafana workspace IAM role
root.name: workspace_iam_role_policy_arn

root.description: The endpoint of the Grafana workspace
root.name: workspace_endpoint

root.description: The workspace service accounts created including their attributes
root.name: workspace_service_accounts
